results.rendered_html:
akṣṇayā ind. Ved.
1 Tortuously, circuitously, in a crooked way; tānakṣṇayā saṃtṛṃdaṃti.  Śat. Br.  (vakramārgeṇa, kauṭilyena).
2 Wrongly; ˚druh Ved. seeking to hurt in a wrongful way.
